roles.name: Product Owner
roles.prompt: Assess 'user login' for scope, value, acceptance criteria. State risks first, then one concrete recommendation.

roles.name: Architect
roles.prompt: Assess 'user login' for boundaries, dependencies, evolution. State risks first, then one concrete recommendation.

roles.name: Developer
roles.prompt: Assess 'user login' for implementation simplicity and maintainability. State risks first, then one concrete recommendation.

roles.name: Tester
roles.prompt: Assess 'user login' for testability, edge cases, regression risk. State risks first, then one concrete recommendation.

roles.name: Security
roles.prompt: Assess 'user login' for secrets, injection, unsafe defaults. State risks first, then one concrete recommendation.

roles.name: Reviewer
roles.prompt: Assess 'user login' for defects, coupling, unclear intent. State risks first, then one concrete recommendation.
